summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NeoNoble Ramp - Audit API, Exchange API, Auth API, and Frontend UI. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend registration, login, dashboard, and Transak widget with audit timeline all working correctly.

minor.issue: Binance connector shows connected=false (geo-blocked 451 error), but Kraken works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Exchange connectors properly handle geo-blocked Binance (451) with fallback to Kraken
Audit service correctly creates sessions, logs events, generates timelines, and exports reports
TransakWidget component properly integrates with audit service - creates session on open, logs events on user actions
test_credentials: Test users created with pattern test_*@example.com / TestPassword123!
seed_data_creation: Multiple test audit sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All audit and exchange APIs are working. Transak widget opens correctly and shows timeline toggle when audit session is active. Binance is geo-blocked (returns 451) but Kraken connector works. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_audit_and_exchange.py covers all audit endpoints.

audit_api.POST /api/audit/sessions: ✓ Creates new audit session with session_id, status, started_at
audit_api.POST /api/audit/events: ✓ Logs events to session with event_id, event_type, timestamp
audit_api.GET /api/audit/timeline/{session_id}: ✓ Returns timeline with phases (setup, kyc, payment, transfer, completion)
audit_api.GET /api/audit/event-types: ✓ Returns all available event types with categories

exchange_api.GET /api/exchanges/status: ✓ Shows Binance (not connected - geo-blocked) and Kraken (connected)

auth_api.POST /api/auth/register: ✓ Creates new user and returns token

frontend.Dashboard: ✓ Shows Transak widget, live prices, crypto selection
frontend.Transak Widget: ✓ Opens modal with Buy/Sell toggle, amount input, wallet address
frontend.Timeline Toggle: ✓ Shows 'Cronologia Transazione' with active session, events, phases
